CODE OF ETHICS </div></div></div> <div style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 6pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;">Our Code of Business Ethics is available on our website at <div style="text-decoration: underline; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;"><div style="white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;"><div style="white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;"><div style="white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">https://www.ericsson.com/en/about-us/corporate-governance/code-of-ethics</div></div></div></div>. The Company will promptly disclose to our shareholders, if required by applicable laws or stock exchange requirements, any amendments to or waivers from the Code of Business Ethics applicable to our directors or officers by posting such information on our website at <div style="text-decoration: underline; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;"><div style="white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;"><div style="white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;"><div style="white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">https://www.ericsson.com/en/about-us/corporate-governance/code-of-ethics</div></div></div></div>. </div> <div style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">The information set forth under the following headings of the 2021 Swedish Annual Report (adjusted version) is incorporated herein by reference: </div></div> <div style="font-size: 6pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-size: 6pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">&#160;</div></div>
<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="border: 0px currentcolor; width: 100%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; border-collapse: collapse; border-spacing: 0px;">
<tr style="page-break-inside: avoid;">
<td style="width: 3%;">&#160;</td>
<td style="width: 2%; vertical-align: top;;text-align:left;">&#8226;</td>
<td style="width: 1%; vertical-align: top;">&#160;</td>
<td style="vertical-align: top;;text-align:left;"> <div style="text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; line-height: normal;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">Corporate Governance Report </div></div> </td> </tr> </table> <div style="clear:both;max-height:0pt;"></div> <div style="font-size: 6pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-size: 6pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">&#160;</div></div>
<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="border: 0px currentcolor; width: 100%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; border-collapse: collapse; border-spacing: 0px;">
<tr style="page-break-inside: avoid;">
<td style="width: 6%;">&#160;</td>
<td style="width: 2%; vertical-align: top;;text-align:left;">&#8226;</td>
<td style="width: 1%; vertical-align: top;">&#160;</td>
<td style="vertical-align: top;;text-align:left;"> <div style="text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; line-height: normal;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">Regulation and Compliance &#8211; Code of business ethics </div></div> </td> </tr> </table> <div style="clear:both;max-height:0pt;"></div> <div id="tx267971_69" style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-weight:bold;display:inline;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">ITEM&#160;16C. PRINCIPAL ACCOUNTANT FEES AND SERVICES </div></div></div> <div style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 6pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">The information set forth under the Section &#8220;Financial Report - Notes to the consolidated financial statements - Note H5 &#8211; Fees to auditors&#8221; of the 2021 Swedish Annual Report (adjusted version) is incorporated herein by reference. </div></div> <div style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-weight:bold;display:inline;"><div style="font-style: normal; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;"><div style="font-style:italic;display:inline;">Audit and Compliance Committee <div style="white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">Pre-Approval</div> Policies and Procedures </div></div></div></div> <div style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 6pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;">The Audit and Compliance Committee reviews and approves the scope of audits to be performed by external and internal auditors and analyzes their results and costs. The Audit and Compliance Committee keeps the Board of Directors informed about the external and internal auditors&#8217; performance. It also makes recommendations to the Nomination Committee regarding the external auditor&#8217;s election and fees. In order to ensure the external auditor&#8217;s independence, the Audit and Compliance Committee has established <div style="white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">pre-approval</div> policies and procedures for audit and <div style="white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">non-audit</div> services to be performed by the external auditor. <div style="white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">Pre-approval</div> authority may not be delegated to management. The policies and procedures include a list of prohibited services, and audit and <div style="white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">non-audit</div> services that require <div style="white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">pre-approval</div> by the Committee. Such services fall into two broad categories: </div> <div style="font-size: 6pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-size: 6pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">&#160;</div></div>
<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="border: 0px currentcolor; width: 100%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; border-collapse: collapse; border-spacing: 0px;">
<tr style="page-break-inside: avoid;">
<td style="width: 3%;">&#160;</td>
<td style="width: 2%; vertical-align: top;;text-align:left;">&#8226;</td>
<td style="width: 1%; vertical-align: top;">&#160;</td>
<td style="vertical-align: top;;text-align:left;"> <div style="text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; line-height: normal;">General <div style="white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">pre-approval</div> &#8211; certain services regarding taxes, transactions, risk management, business improvement, attestation and accounting services and the so called general services (other than prohibited services) have received general <div style="white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">pre-approval</div> by the Audit and Compliance Committee, provided that the estimated fee for each project does not exceed SEK 1&#160;million. The external auditor must advise the Audit and Compliance Committee with a quarterly summary of ongoing projects related to audit and <div style="white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">non-audit</div> services and an annual report of fees and expenses for all audit and <div style="white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">non-audit</div> services. </div> </td> </tr> </table> <div style="clear:both;max-height:0pt;"></div> <div style="font-size: 6pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-size: 6pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">&#160;</div></div>
<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="border: 0px currentcolor; width: 100%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; border-collapse: collapse; border-spacing: 0px;">
<tr style="page-break-inside: avoid;">
<td style="width: 3%;">&#160;</td>
<td style="width: 2%; vertical-align: top;;text-align:left;">&#8226;</td>
<td style="width: 1%; vertical-align: top;">&#160;</td>
<td style="vertical-align: top;;text-align:left;"> <div style="text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; line-height: normal;">Specific <div style="white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">pre-approval</div> &#8211; all other <div style="white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">non-audit</div> services and services subject to general <div style="white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">pre-approval</div> exceeding SEK 1&#160;million must receive specific <div style="white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">pre-approval.</div> The external auditor submits an application in writing to the Parent Company for final approval by the Audit and Compliance Committee, including a statement as to whether, in the view of the external auditor, the contemplated services are consistent with applicable rules on their independence. The Audit and Compliance Committee Chairman has the delegated authority for specific <div style="white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">pre-approval</div> in between Committee meetings, provided that the estimated fee in each case does not exceed SEK 2.5&#160;million. The Chairman reports any <div style="white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">pre-approval</div> to the Audit and Compliance Committee at its next meeting. </div> </td> </tr> </table> <div style="clear:both;max-height:0pt;"></div> <div style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;">All services provided in 2021 by the independent auditors were <div style="white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">pre-approved</div> in accordance with the <div style="white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">pre-approval</div> policies and procedures described above. </div> <div id="tx267971_70" style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-weight:bold;display:inline;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">ITEM&#160;16D. EXEMPTIONS FROM THE LISTING STANDARDS FOR AUDIT COMMITTEES </div></div></div> <div style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 6pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;">All members of the Audit Committee of a NASDAQ New York-listed company must be independent in accordance with NASDAQ New York and SEC rules. SEC Rule <div style="white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">10A-3(b)(1)(iv)(C)</div> under the Exchange Act includes a specific exemption from these independence requirements for Audit Committee </div> <div style="font-size: 8pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-size: 8pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">&#160;</div></div> <div style="text-align: center; font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">14 </div></div> </div> </div> <div style="margin-top: 1em; margin-bottom: 0em; page-break-before: always;"></div> <hr style="width: 100%; height: 3px; color: rgb(153, 153, 153);"/> <div style="font-size: 13.28px; margin-top: 1.67em; margin-bottom: 1.67em;;font-weight: bold;"><a href="#toc">Table of Contents</a></div> <div style="text-align: center;"> <div style="width: 8.5in; text-align: left; margin-right: auto; margin-left: auto;"> <div style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;">members of foreign private issuers who are <div style="white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">non-executive</div> employee representatives appointed to the Audit Committee pursuant to local law. The Company relies on this exemption, and does not consider that such reliance materially adversely affects the ability of the Audit and Compliance Committee to act independently or to satisfy other SEC requirements applicable to Audit Committees. </div> <div id="tx267971_71" style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-weight:bold;display:inline;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">ITEM&#160;16E. PURCHASES OF EQUITY SECURITIES BY THE ISSUER AND AFFILIATED PURCHASERS </div></div></div> <div style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 6pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">None. </div></div> <div id="tx267971_72" style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-weight:bold;display:inline;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">ITEM&#160;16F. CHANGE IN REGISTRANT&#8217;S CERTIFYING ACCOUNTANT </div></div></div> <div style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 6pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">None. </div></div> <div id="tx267971_73" style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-weight:bold;display:inline;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">ITEM&#160;16G. CORPORATE GOVERNANCE </div></div></div> <div style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 6pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">Ericsson, as a company whose shares are listed on NASDAQ New York, is subject to the listing requirements and certain of the corporate governance requirements of NASDAQ New York and to certain rules of the SEC. </div></div> <div style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;">Under NASDAQ New York rules, all members of the audit committee of a NASDAQ New York- listed company must be independent in accordance with SEC rules. SEC rules include a specific exemption from these independence requirements for an employee of a foreign private issuer who is not an executive officer if the employee is elected or named to the board of directors or audit committee pursuant to the issuer&#8217;s governing law or documents, or other home country legal or listing requirements<div style="letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;"><div style="font-weight:bold;display:inline;">. </div></div>The Company relies on this exemption and does not consider that such reliance materially adversely affects the ability of the Audit and Compliance Committee to act independently or to satisfy other SEC requirements applicable to audit committees. </div> <div style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">Under NASDAQ New York rules, Ericsson is permitted to follow home country practices in lieu of certain NASDAQ corporate governance requirements that would apply to US companies listed on NASDAQ New York. The rules require disclosures regarding the ways in which Ericsson&#8217;s corporate governance practices differ from those required of US companies under the rules of NASDAQ New York. </div></div> <div style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 12pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">These differences include the following: </div></div> <div style="font-size: 6pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-size: 6pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">&#160;</div></div>
<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="border: 0px currentcolor; width: 100%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; border-collapse: collapse; border-spacing: 0px;">
<tr style="page-break-inside: avoid;">
<td style="width: 3%;">&#160;</td>
<td style="width: 2%; vertical-align: top;;text-align:left;">&#8226;</td>
<td style="width: 1%; vertical-align: top;">&#160;</td>
<td style="vertical-align: top;;text-align:left;"> <div style="text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; line-height: normal;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">Employee representatives are appointed to Ericsson&#8217;s Board of Directors and serve on Committees (including the Audit and Compliance Committee and the Remuneration Committee) in accordance with Swedish law. </div></div> </td> </tr> </table> <div style="clear:both;max-height:0pt;"></div> <div style="font-size: 6pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-size: 6pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">&#160;</div></div>
<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="border: 0px currentcolor; width: 100%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; border-collapse: collapse; border-spacing: 0px;">

<td style="width: 3%;">&#160;</td>

<td style="width: 1%; vertical-align: top;">&#160;</td>
<td style="vertical-align: top;;text-align:left;"> <div style="text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; line-height: normal;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">Employee representatives on the Ericsson Board and committees may attend all meetings of the Board and committees on which they serve (including those of the Audit and Compliance Committee and the Remuneration Committee) in accordance with Swedish law. </div></div> </td> </tr> </table> <div style="clear:both;max-height:0pt;"></div> <div style="font-size: 6pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-size: 6pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">&#160;</div></div>
<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="border: 0px currentcolor; width: 100%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; border-collapse: collapse; border-spacing: 0px;">
<tr style="page-break-inside: avoid;">
<td style="width: 3%;">&#160;</td>
<td style="width: 2%; vertical-align: top;;text-align:left;">&#8226;</td>
<td style="width: 1%; vertical-align: top;">&#160;</td>
<td style="vertical-align: top;;text-align:left;"> <div style="text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; line-height: normal;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">In accordance with Swedish market practices, the Nomination Committee is not fully comprised of Board members. In addition to the Chair of the Board, representatives of the four largest shareholders are members of the current Nomination Committee of Ericsson. </div></div> </td> </tr> </table> <div style="clear:both;max-height:0pt;"></div> <div style="font-size: 6pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-size: 6pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">&#160;</div></div>

<td style="vertical-align: top;;text-align:left;"> <div style="text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; line-height: normal;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">The determination regarding independence of Board members is made by the Nomination Committee (instead of the Board) prior to the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders (&#8220;AGM&#8221;). Before the AGM 2021, the Nomination Committee determined that the following Board members were independent under all applicable independence requirements, including the NASDAQ New York rules: Jon Fredrik Baksaas, Jan Carlson, Nora Denzel, Eric A. Elzvik, Kurt Jofs and Kristin S. Rinne. When appointing members to the committees of the Board, the Board makes determinations regarding committee member independence. </div></div> </td> </tr> </table> <div style="clear:both;max-height:0pt;"></div> <div style="font-size: 6pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-size: 6pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">&#160;</div></div>

<td style="vertical-align: top;;text-align:left;"> <div style="text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; line-height: normal;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">Under applicable Swedish rules, Ericsson is not required to publicly disclose the material terms of all agreements and arrangements between its directors or nominees for director and any person or entity (other than Ericsson) relating to compensation or other payment in connection with such person&#8217;s candidacy or service as a director of the company. </div></div> </td> </tr> </table> <div style="clear:both;max-height:0pt;"></div> <div style="font-size: 6pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-size: 6pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">&#160;</div></div>
<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="border: 0px currentcolor; width: 100%; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; border-collapse: collapse; border-spacing: 0px;">

<td style="width: 1%; vertical-align: top;">&#160;</td>
<td style="vertical-align: top;;text-align:left;"> <div style="text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; line-height: normal;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">The external auditor is elected by the shareholders and is proposed by the Nomination Committee upon recommendation from the Audit and Compliance Committee. </div></div> </td> </tr> </table> <div style="clear:both;max-height:0pt;"></div> <div style="font-size: 6pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-size: 6pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">&#160;</div></div>

<td style="width: 1%; vertical-align: top;">&#160;</td>
<td style="vertical-align: top;;text-align:left;"> <div style="text-align: left; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; line-height: normal;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: 9pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">NASDAQ New York rules applicable to US companies require the consideration of six factors relating to the independence of compensation consultants, legal counsel or other advisers retained by compensation or remuneration committees. Consistent with Swedish practices, the Remuneration Committee&#8217;s procedures addressing independence of advisers do not expressly require the consideration of those six factors. </div></div> </td> </tr> </table> <div style="clear:both;max-height:0pt;"></div> <div style="font-size: 6pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-size: 6pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">&#160;</div></div>

However, the Board may collect proxies in accordance with the Articles of Association. </div></div> </td> </tr> </table> <div style="clear:both;max-height:0pt;"></div> <div style="font-size: 6pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"><div style="font-size: 6pt; letter-spacing: 0px; top: 0px;;display:inline;">&#160;</div></div>

The work procedure establishes the attribution of various responsibilities among the Board, its committees and the President and CEO.
